recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Savageland
recommendations.overview: When a small town near the Arizona-Mexico border is wiped out overnight, suspicion falls on the lone survivor. But a roll of photos the survivor took that night tells a different story.
recommendations.director: David Whelan, Phil Guidry, Simon Herbert

recommendations.title: Tell No One
recommendations.overview: A man receives a mysterious email appearing to be from his wife, who was murdered years earlier. As he frantically tries to find out whether she's alive, he finds himself being implicated in her death.

recommendations.title: What Have You Done to Solange?
recommendations.overview: After several Catholic school pupils are murdered, a teacher who is having an affair with one of his students becomes a suspect. When other gruesome murders start occurring shortly thereafter, the teacher suspects that he may be the cause of them.

recommendations.title: Foxy Brown
recommendations.overview: A voluptuous black woman takes a job as a high-class prostitute in order to get revenge on the mobsters who murdered her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: What We Become
recommendations.overview: A family of four is quarantined in their home as a virulent strand of the flu spreads into town and they are forced to the extreme to escape alive.

recommendations.title: Shutter
recommendations.overview: When Jane and Tun run over a girl in a car accident, they speed away immediately from the crime scene. However, Tun, a photographer, soon discovers strange shadows in his photos, which unsettles them.

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Killed My Parents
recommendations.overview: Based on one of the most shocking and gruesome murder cases in Brazil, the film presents de Suzane von Richthofen's point of view of the events that led to the death of her parents.

recommendations.title: The Wild One
recommendations.overview: The Black Rebels Motorcycle Club ride into the small California town of Wrightsville, eager to raise hell. Brooding gang leader Johnny Strabler takes a liking to Kathie, the daughter of the local lawman, as another club rolls into town.
